news.title: Riverdale Police looking for 2 people accused of setting car on fire
news.summary: Security footage captured two people, appearing to be a man and a woman, intentionally starting the fire.

news.title: Man accused of shooting at person while trying to steal car at metro Atlanta gas station
news.summary: The Forsyth County Sheriff’s Office said a man was arrested after allegedly trying to steal someone’s car at gunpoint while they were standing at a gas station’s pumps.

news.title: Police seek man and woman for questioning in Riverdale car arson
news.summary: A man and woman are wanted for questioning in connection with a reported arson case Thursday involving a parked car at a Riverdale supermarket.

news.title: 62-year-old metro Atlanta man arrested for allegedly stabbing roommate to death
news.summary: The stabbing happened back in April at a Flat Shoals Road apartment in Decatur.

news.title: Newnan man drives 140 mph on Interstate 85 thinking he was being pulled over
news.summary: A Newnan man faces a Coweta County reckless driving arrest after fleeing from a deputy on Interstate 85 last week.

news.title: Driver caught going 111 mph on interstate during holiday weekend, metro Atlanta police dept. says
news.summary: Conyers PD reminded people no destination is worth risking one’s own life or the lives of others.

news.title: Service dog shot and killed by Cobb County deputy on Forrest Hill Road
news.summary: A Cobb County sheriff's deputy shot and killed a service dog named Phee Phee while attempting to serve a warrant Wednesday.

news.title: Affidavit: DeKalb officer accidentally shot 19-year-old in the back while he was cuffing him on the ground
news.summary: Derrick Harris Jr. was terminated from the DeKalb County Police Department in the case and faces charges of felony involuntary manslaughter and reckless conduct.

news.title: Officer’s gun accidentally fired, killing man during arrest, investigators say
news.summary: Former DeKalb County police officer charged in fatal shooting of 19-year-old man during arrest is released on bond.

news.title: Florida man killed on I-20 after stopping for boat trouble
news.summary: An 82-year-old Florida man was struck and killed on Interstate 20 in Newton County early Thursday.

news.title: 61-year-old caught on video performing lewd act in front of child at Decatur Library
news.summary: Police said it occurred on the second floor of the library on July 6.

news.title: Body found 'severely decomposed' floating in river in Cartersville
news.summary: Once the body was taken out of the water, police said they noticed the right hand was missing.

news.title: DeKalb County officer terminated, facing charges after 19-year-old shot and killed
news.summary: The GBI said the officer will be booked into the DeKalb County Jail once he is in custody.
